description_long: This is a compact, modern toaster with a rounded rectangular body finished in a matte black color. The front features a prominent lever for lowering bread and a set of four small, circular blue indicator buttons above a single round control knob, likely for adjusting browning settings. The top surface has two parallel, elongated slots for inserting bread, with metallic edges visible around the openings. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the minimalist design. The toaster sits on a slightly recessed base, which may provide stability and a subtle visual separation from the surface it rests on. No visible branding or power cord is present, and the crumb tray is not apparent from any angle.
description: A matte black, rounded toaster with two top slots, a front lever, blue indicator buttons, and a single control knob.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lever, four blue indicator buttons, and a round control knob.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the smooth, unadorned surface and the lever protruding slightly.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, curved surface and no visible controls or features.
description_view_3: Angled front-side view highlighting the control knob, blue buttons, and the two top slots.
attribute_control_knobs: One round black control knob on the lower right front, with no visible markings or labels.
attribute_toast_slots: Two parallel, elongated slots on the top, evenly spaced and edged with metal.
